plans.name: Growth
plans.ideal_for: Growing teams that need automation and deeper reporting

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.ideal_for: Enterprises needing compliance, scale, and white-glove support

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

faq.question: Can I switch plans?
faq.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Upgrades are prorated immediately; downgrades take effect at the next billing cycle.

faq.question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 30% off for registered nonprofits. Contact sales@nexushq.io.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH bank transfer, and wire transfer for annual Enterprise contracts.

faq.question: Is my data secure?
faq.answer: All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Enterprise plans include SOC 2 Type II and HIPAA compliance.

faq.question: What does SSO include?
faq.answer: SSO on Enterprise supports SAML 2.0 and OIDC, compatible with Okta, Azure AD, Google Workspace, and any standards-compliant IdP.

faq.question: What is the refund policy?
faq.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee for monthly plans. Annual plans are non-refundable but can be credited.
